div.span: candidate extraction only
runtime or test run
technical prose intake blocked by default
allowed only for separately maintained public-only artifacts
reviewed manual may feed website summary
E1 Developer
E2 Reviewer / MDO curator
E3 Educator / technical writer
E4 Public reader
E5 AI / external analysis tool
P4.1 Run report-only collectors and probes
P4.2 Classify findings, confidence, ownership, and status
P4.3 Preserve manifests, hashes, paths, and provenance
P4.4 Capture runtime transcripts, screenshots, and canaries
P4.5 Crosswalk HELP, metadata, messages, commands, manuals, diagrams, and website targets
P4.6 Open MDO work order and assemble review packet
P4.7 Run manualgen inventory, validate, parity, and dry-run
P4.8 Review and promote narrative / diagram candidate
P4.9 Build and publish versioned static artifacts
P4.10 Intake feedback as an issue or evidence candidate
D4.1 Source, HELP DATA, metadata, messages, and validator reports
D4.2 SelfDoc tool and pipeline manifests
D4.3 SelfDoc inventories, candidate reports, and policy records
D4.4 LabTalk proof registry and proof artifacts
D4.5 Crosswalk CSVs and attachment / section maps
D4.6 MDO work orders, review packets, decision ledgers
D4.7 Manualgen logs, manifests, validation reports, draft workspace
D4.8 Canonical manual sections and diagram sources
D4.9 Website source and artifact/manual-room manifests
D4.10 Versioned x64base.com and dottalkpp.com output
G4.1 Report-only / non-mutation gate
G4.2 Evidence honesty and status gate
G4.3 Human acceptance gate
G4.4 Public-content, link, provenance, and build gate
G4.5 Website-to-manual reverse-flow gate
